'''pazugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khabbar|khabbar]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khabbar|khabbar]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| pazugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæzigith|pæzigith]] || [[word:pæzigij|pæzigij]] || [[word:pæzigish|pæzigish]] || [[word:pæzigi|pæzigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:pazuzuguth|pazuzuguth]] || [[word:pazuzuguj|pazuzuguj]] || [[word:pazuzugush|pazuzugush]] || [[word:pazuzugu|pazuzugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:pazuguth|pazuguth]] || [[word:pazuguj|pazuguj]] || [[word:pazugush|pazugush]] || [[word:pazugu|pazugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:pazufguth|pazufguth]] || [[word:pazufguj|pazufguj]] || [[word:pazufgush|pazufgush]] || [[word:pazufguf|pazufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pazuguthu|pazuguthu]] || [[word:pazuguju|pazuguju]] || [[word:pazugushu|pazugushu]] || [[word:pazuguku|pazuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pazuguth|pazuguth]] || [[word:pazuguj|pazuguj]] || [[word:pazugush|pazugush]] || [[word:pazugu|pazugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pazuguthul|pazuguthul]] || [[word:pazugujul|pazugujul]] || [[word:pazugushul|pazugushul]] || [[word:pazugukul|pazugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pazuguthuthu|pazuguthuthu]] || [[word:pazugujuju|pazugujuju]] || [[word:pazugushushu|pazugushushu]] || [[word:pazuguku|pazuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pazuguthun|pazuguthun]] || [[word:pazugujun|pazugujun]] || [[word:pazugushun|pazugushun]] || [[word:pazugukun|pazugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pazuguthuoro|pazuguthuoro]] || [[word:pazugujuoro|pazugujuoro]] || [[word:pazugushuoro|pazugushuoro]] || [[word:pazugukuoro|pazugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
